recommendations.title: Wedding Unplanned
recommendations.overview: When she discovers a wedding planer's business card, Alexia instantly says, "YES" to Mathias unaware that it belongs to his mistress. The groom is now trapped between his bride, and his lover who in charge of his unwanted marriage.

recommendations.title: The Incredible Journey
recommendations.overview: The story of three pets, a cat and two dogs, who lose their owners when they are all on vacation. Can they find their way home?

recommendations.title: Sahara
recommendations.overview: A young cobra and his scorpion best friend go on a journey across the Sahara desert to save a new-found love.

recommendations.title: Paris or Perish
recommendations.overview: Maya is living the ultimate fashionistas dream: she is working as a stylist for one of the French trend setters, in the capital of haute-couture: Paris.  One of the IT girls of fashion, shes following her dreams until one night, when her life takes a

recommendations.title: OSS 117: Lost in Rio
recommendations.overview: In 1967, OSS 117 is sent to Brazil in order to retrieve a microfilm list of French Nazi sympathizers, only to once again unknowingly set foot into a bigger international intrigue.

recommendations.title: CODA
recommendations.overview: As a CODA (Child of Deaf Adults), Ruby is the only hearing person in her deaf family. When the family's fishing business is threatened, Ruby finds herself torn between pursuing her love of music and her fear of abandoning her parents.

recommendations.title: Brutus vs Cesar
recommendations.overview: Faced with the tyranny of Caesar who acts as absolute master over Rome, Senators Rufus and Cassius form a plot to assassinate him.

recommendations.title: A Dog's Purpose
recommendations.overview: A dog goes on quest to discover his purpose in life over the course of several lifetimes with multiple owners.

recommendations.title: Bad Hair Day

recommendations.title: Monica and Friends: Bonds
